name: tsubame
description: Interact with the Institute of Science Tokyo TSUBAME4.0 supercomputer: submit and monitor Grid Engine jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in TSUBAME4 guide.

interface.shortDescription: Submit and monitor TSUBAME4 Grid Engine jobs and search TSUBAME4 docs.
interface.longDescription: Interact with the Institute of Science Tokyo TSUBAME4.0 supercomputer from Codex: submit and monitor Grid Engine (GPU) jobs, manage files on the cluster, and search the built-in TSUBAME4 guide.
defaultPrompt: Submit a TSUBAME4 trial-run test job.
